subject: add fluent type builder support to A&AI client
commit_message:
add fluent type builder support to A&AI client

add fluent type builder support to A&AI client

Issue-ID: SO-2856
Signed-off-by: Benjamin, Max (mb388a) <mb388a@att.com>

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 3 on the queue.

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/4159/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/4159/ )
